_comment: WRONG - Never use logic/operators, and never prefix bindings with `data.`
_note_on_data_prefix: The `data: [...]` block in a Collection cell Layout declares variable names + types. It is NOT a namespace. Bindings always reference the bare name (e.g. `@{titleKey}`, `@{onNavigate}`). Prefixing with `data.` breaks at runtime — the generated code emits direct property access.
